results.title: Katalyst : The AI agent that works your Salesforce Pipeline
results.content:
Hi, I'm Div, Founder & CEO of Katalyst.  
  
At Datadog, I watched our best enterprise reps closing multi-million-dollar deals - lose hours every week to work that had nothing to do with selling. Updating Salesforce, prepping for QBRs, rebuilding context that already lived in an email or a call recording. The people best at selling were spending the most time not selling.  
I couldn't unsee it.   
  
So we've spent the last year building Katalyst to fix it: working hands-on with sales leaders and reps across teams like Stripe, Atlassian, Justworks, Datadog.  
  
Katalyst is an AI sales agent for teams on Salesforce. It runs 24/7, reads your calls, emails, and calendar, and turns it into action:   
- Salesforce records created and fields updated on its own [...] Subscribe

@dipankar\_sarkar Small addition to Div's answer. A suggestion is only marked done after Salesforce confirms the write. If Salesforce bounces it, nothing gets marked accepted and nothing changes in Katalyst, the suggestion just stays in the rep's queue with the Salesforce error. And since reps can edit a suggested value before accepting, they can fix what the rule complained about and accept again. No repair-and-resubmit happens without them.

# Introducing Katalyst - The AI Agent that runs your Salesforce pipeline 24/7
## Katalyst
12 subscribers
6 likes

### Description
78 views
Posted: 7 Jul 2026
Katalyst is an AI sales agent for teams on Salesforce. It works your pipeline 24/7 - so your reps can get back to what they're actually great at: people.

Salespeople remember your kid's game and your favorite lunch spot. That's why they're good at the job. So why did we bury them behind data entry and a CRM they hate?

Katalyst sits in your meetings, reads your emails, and watches every account, and keeps Salesforce updated on its own, without anyone asking. [...] just stuck in updating records. So when a deal goes quiet, or someone 
leaves, all of it... walks out of your door. You never know why you lost, 
or why you won the deal. Katalyst is an AI that just works your 
Salesforce pipeline. All day, all night. It sits in your meetings, it reads 
every email, watches all your accounts, and quietly updates everything back to 
Salesforce. Without anyone asking it to. It actually understands your deals, the way 
your best reps can, except it never forgets. .
The first time I saw a customer use Katalyst, I was like, yes. This 
is exactly how it was supposed to feel all along. Katalyst found a signal on one of his 
largest accounts overnight. Drafted an email right in his inbox. He just read it, [...] No migration. Katalyst keeps Salesforce as your system of record and adds the layer of action on top - minutes to value on the setup you already run.

—

# Introducing Katalyst - the Agent that runs pipeline on Salesforce.

by

Katalyst 

Katalyst

•

Hey everyone,

We just launched Katalyst for sales teams on Salesforce.

Simple idea: reps don't hate selling, they hate the hours they lose every week feeding the CRM. Logging calls, fixing stages and close dates, writing next steps, reconstructing what happened on a deal from three weeks ago. The CRM they "quietly hate."

Most tools just made data entry slightly less painful. It's still the rep doing the work. [...] Katalyst reads the calls, emails, and calendar and keeps the opportunity current on its own. Stages, next steps, close dates, contacts. Plus a hygiene score so you can see which deals are actually clean and which are quietly rotting.

We're not trying to be a full-auto AI SDR that spams people while you sleep.   
  
It's the layer underneath, it does the hygiene work so reps get their week back for the part only humans can do.

Would love feedback from AEs, sales leaders, RevOps, and anyone who's rage-quit their CRM on a Friday.

joinkatalyst.com

100 views

The "quietly rotting deals" problem is very real .A system that catches those early could save teams a lot of wasted efforts.

Report

xinyuanwei

This framing really resonates: reps don’t hate selling, they hate feeding the CRM.

What I like here is that Katalyst isn’t trying to be a flashy “AI SDR” that replaces the human part of sales. It’s going after the quieter but very real operational drag — keeping opportunities, next steps, close dates, contacts, and deal context clean without making reps do all the admin work manually.

results.content:
## More About Katalyst

### Katalyst

Katalyst is an AI sales agent for teams on Salesforce that moves deals forward by turning every meeting, email, and signal into next steps. It keeps Salesforce always updated so reps can focus on selling. Trusted by fast-growing B2B teams.

 •

  Salesforce Automation:Summarizes all customer interactions and updates relevant deal fields in Salesforce, ensuring always up-to-date pipeline data for better forecasting and analysis.
 •

  AI Next Steps:Turns every interaction into actionable next steps using your playbook and deal history, then scribes them back to Salesforce.
 •

  Signals:Surfaces critical signals like leadership moves, hiring, events, and website activity so reps engage buyers at the right time and accelerate deals.
 • [...] In today's competitive sales environment, Katalyst eliminates the manual work of piecing deal context and updating CRM, allowing reps to focus on selling. By automating research, next steps, and pipeline hygiene, it ensures no deal slips through the cracks. Choose Katalyst to arm your pipeline with actionable insights and close more deals.

## Katalyst Alternatives

Rep by Clarify

### Rep by Clarify

Automates sales tasks, offering key deal insights and streamlined workflows for sales teams.

Jotform Salesforce Agent

### Jotform Salesforce Agent

An intelligent assistant streamlines Salesforce tasks, enhancing efficiency with automated data management and support capabilities.
